case_title: BLYTHE, JENNIE GENTLE VS YELLOW CAB COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COMPANY
DEFTS & CROSS DEFTS WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,631.05 FILED BY BLYTHE, JENNIE GENTLE AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COMPANY BUTT, HAMID NASEER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $698.57 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COMPANY BUTT, HAMID NASEER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BLYTHE, JENNIE GENTLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUTT, HAMID NASEER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLYTHE, JENNIE GENTLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COMPANY BUTT, HAMID NASEER $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,770.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YELLOW CAB COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BLYTHE, JENNIE GENTLE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-10-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-07-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
